title: Fix MarkUS PocketBase realtime comment sync
description: Debug and fix browser realtime subscriptions so PocketBase review_comments create/update/delete events refresh the live comment list across devices.

affected_files.reason: PocketBase realtime EventSource subscription and sync trigger
browser regression coverage for PocketBase SSE event names
existing live Playwright tests are located here, including PocketBase realtime coverage
committed npm lock metadata contains package version and must match the 1.1.3 release

doc_reason: PocketBase realtime SSE event names and subscription behavior must be verified against official docs

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: PocketBase sends realtime record events on the exact subscription topic key registered with /api/realtime, including serialized options, and exposes the PB_CONNECT client id as lastEventId. MarkUS now listens to that exact topic while keeping message and bare collection fallbacks.

metadata.reason: existing live Playwright tests are located here, including PocketBase realtime coverage
committed npm lock metadata contains package version and must match the 1.1.3 release
